name: How long do I have to file a claim after a construction accident in Boise?
description: 2 years for Idaho third-party suits; report workers' comp now.[2]

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file a claim after a construction accident in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: 2 years for Idaho third-party suits; report workers' comp now.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: **In Idaho, you have 2 years for third-party personal injury lawsuits; workers' comp has shorter reporting deadlines.** Idaho Code sets a 2-year statute of limitations for jobsite accidents beyond workers' comp.[2] Key factors: (1) Report workers' comp injury immediately to avoid denial; (2) third-party claims against subs or manufacturers must be filed within 2 years; (3) delays risk losing evidence or witnesses; (4) comparative fault reduces recovery if over 50% your fault.[2] Track all dates, file paperwork promptly, and get legal help to meet deadlines. Missing them bars recovery entirely.
